subject: History

deployment.subject: History
deployment.syllabus: NCERT Grade 6 Exploring Society: India and Beyond

sourceMaterials.title: NCERT ePathshala: Exploring Society, Chapter 4 — Timeline and Sources of History
themes: placing events and periods on timelines
learning about the past from different kinds of sources
comparing what evidence can and cannot support

requiredVocabulary.meaning: the order in which events happened
evidence people use to learn about the past

localContextNotes: Use original time-travel roleplay with genuine choices about which evidence to inspect next.
Keep invented scenarios clearly hypothetical and never present invented names, dates, quotations, or events as historical facts.
Ask what a source supports and what remains uncertain before drawing a conclusion.
originalityRequirements: Write original scenarios and questions without copying source examples, captions, timelines, or prose.
Do not add historical facts beyond the human-reviewed themes in this brief.

notes: Builder must open the official chapter and verify the themes, vocabulary, and excluded factual scope.
